name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior / Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots, screen recordings, or console/error logs to help
explain the problem.

## Environment Details

Please fill in the environment details below:

- **OS & Version:** [e.g., macOS Sequoia 15.1, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Node.js Version:** [e.g., v20.18.0]
- **pnpm Version:** [e.g., v9.12.2]
- **Skrvm Orchestrator Version:** [e.g., 0.1.0]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
